title: 5 Stocks Shining as Bargains
text: When browsing the market for bargain opportunities in U.S.-listed stocks, investors may want to consider the following stocks, as they meet the criteria below:

title: Chemical Stock Poised To Bounce Back Amid C-Suite Shakeup
text: The shares of LyondellBasell Industries (LYB) look ready to bounce back, amid news that Peter Vanacker will become the company's CEO, effective May 23.
